title: 目指す場所に近道はない

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well then, Trainer, let's get right to the experi—

text_block_list.name: Curly-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Tachyon!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh? It's you...

text_block_list.name: Curly-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I'm racing soon! Have you perfected the remedy
that'll make me faster?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! Our last interaction prompted me
to do a bit of research on you.

text_block_list.name: Curly-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Um... wh-what do you mean? Why did you need
to research me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Could you run for a bit? I just want to make
sure I understand something correctly.

text_block_list.name: Curly-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... An impromptu run... Is this your kind of idea to tell me you're faster than me?!

text_block_list.name: Curly-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Enough of this already! I don't care if it's
cheating, just give me th—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Have you been properly focusing on training in
the areas you want to improve?

text_block_list.name: Curly-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Huh? O-of course! I'm best at end closing, so I've
been doing training that suits—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No. I'm pretty sure you're suited to be a front
runner.

text_block_list.name: Curly-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You have quick reactions at the start of a race,
and the determination to win at any cost.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No matter how I look at it, I keep coming to the
conclusion that you are best suited as a front
runner.

text_block_list.name: Curly-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
B-but... before I started losing, I was winning as
an end closer...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You sure you haven't just convinced yourself of
that? It's better to keep your possibilities wide
open.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I suggest you begin including front runner training
to your regimen from here on out. What do you
say?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Fixating on your past victories will only see you
stagnate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Like I always say, things are evolving and
changing every day.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What one considers correct today might turn out
the exact opposite tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If you're not careful, you may find yourself
affixed to obsolete knowledge.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: In other words, body modification is—

text_block_list.name: Curly-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
W-wait... then the training I've been pushing
myself to do until now was...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All for nothing? Is that what you were going to
say? Don't jump to such extreme conclusions.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps your conviction is too extreme. You
should have reevaluated your running style
before pushing yourself so hard.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You see, the concoction that'd make you faster is
what is worthless. Besides, these body
modifications are—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh... heh-heh. Couldn't have said it better myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My concoctions are for the purpose of gaining
knowledge, for the purpose of discovering new
methods to gain strength.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, don't trivialize my efforts by calling what I do
cheating.

text_block_list.name: Curly-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ah... I, uh...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Here, I've already shown you your potential!
What you do from now is up to you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I may not have a remedy to make you faster, but
I'll give you something better! This will surely help
you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Saying that, Agnes Tachyon hands her a clear bag
containing pills.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Phew. Well, that took up a lot of our time, but it
was a rare and valuable experience.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You would be interested, huh? Heh-heh. Take a
guess.
choice_data_list: Probably a bunch of candy and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh! That obvious, huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I told her it was a drug that could double the
effects of her regular training.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But actually, they're just simple supplements. The
power of the placebo effect is not to be
underestimated.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to give it a try, Trainer? But of
course you would. Let's see, in your case...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
How about I give you a drink that binds you as my
assistant for life?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh... Even if you don't take it, your future is
still the same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, I see the curly-haired Umamusume
running in the lead at her scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh... Of course I have something for
you too! It's not the same as what I gave her
though. This here is specially made!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon forces me to take a pill!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This concoction has the effect of making you
devote your life to the first thing you see!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now you can no longer escape me! You'll live out
the rest of your days as my assistant!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's nonsense, I tell myself as I begin preparing
to devote my entirety to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time later, I see the curly-haired
Umamusume running in the lead at her
scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Incidentally, it turns out those pills she received
were just normal supplements.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: It's too bad I only gave her mere supplements.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I told her it was a drug that could double the
effects of her regular training.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You know, sometimes it's important to have our
own convictions. That being said...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You mentioning candy just now gives me an
intense craving for something sweet!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm thinking chocolate. Trainer, go buy me some!
Hurry!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And... yes! I'll give you something to make your
legs faster!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, she hands me a "mere supplement,"
like what she gave the Umamusume from earlier. I
take it, but of course, my speed doesn't increase.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time later, I see the curly-haired
Umamusume running in the lead at her
scrimmage.
